basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 46 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees’ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Teaching Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website of ESIC. A total of 46 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines
qualification.details: Professor: As per latest NMC guidelines Associate Professor: As per latest NMC guidelines Assistant Professor: As per latest NMC guidelines

salary_details.pay_scale: Professor: ₹2,60,226/- per month, Associate Professor: ₹1,73,045/- per month, Assistant Professor: ₹1,48,669/- per month
salary_details.details: Professor: Consolidated pay ₹2,60,226/- per month Associate Professor: Consolidated pay ₹1,73,045/- per month Assistant Professor: Consolidated pay ₹1,48,669/- per month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts is scheduled to be held on 09 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Teaching Faculty posts in ESIC?
faq.answer: There are a total of 46 vacancies for Teaching Faculty posts in ESIC, including Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these ESIC posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Teaching Faculty posts in ESIC is 69 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Professor post?
faq.answer: The consolidated pay for the Professor post is ₹2,60,226/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification required for the Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The qualification required for the Teaching Faculty posts is as per the latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any online application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online beforehand.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for ESIC Teaching Faculty posts being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is being held in Faridabad, Haryana. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these ESIC posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on academic credentials and interview performance.
